positive: A minimalist, geometric portrait of a stylized woodland creature, like a fox or a deer, rendered in thick, abstract silhouette art. The central composition features the animal in a serene, watchful pose, surrounded by highly stylized abstract foliage and celestial elements (crescent moons, stylized stars). The aesthetic should be Nordic-inspired and highly graphic, using a limited palette of deep forest greens, ochre yellow, and creamy ivory. Focus on strong outlines and clean, flat color blocking with deep contrast for maximum print impact. Vector illustration quality, high detail, symmetrical balance, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, artifacts, poor composition, text, signature, watermark, gradient, photorealism, dirty, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, detailed skin
